questionHtml:
A seashell selected at random has a length less than 26 mm.

Find the probability that its length is between 24.15 mm and 25 mm.
markschemeHtml:
recognizing conditional probability        (M1)

correct substitution        A1

0.3554 1 − 0.10621

= 0.398       A1

[3 marks]

meta.title: A seashell selected at random has a length less than 26 mm. Find the probability that its length is between 24.15 mm and 25 mm.
